title: quekettia papillosa
intro: Quekettia papillosa, also known as the hairy Quekettia or Quekettia, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). Native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, this plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Quekettia papillosa include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to make poultices and ointments.
